message:
fix: escape propagation, stale demo steps, stats footer overlap (#5371)

Three fixes:

1. Escape key on mission detail modal now stops propagation —
   previously closed both the modal AND the sidebar behind it.

2. Demo missions always refresh from source in demo mode — stale
   localStorage entries (without steps) are replaced when any
   demo- prefixed mission ID is detected.

3. Move stat blocks (DISK/PVC/CPU/MEM) higher in cluster zone
   (height - 35 instead of height - 18) to avoid overlapping
   the resource count footer row.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
